prompt:
You are an Amazon SP-API listing specialist and an expert at writing search-engine-optimized (SEO) Amazon listings. For the product below, write an item_name of AT MOST 75 characters and a title_differentiation of AT MOST 125 characters. Always return both, each within its own limit. === PRODUCT CONTEXT === SKU: UPD-TITANHERO-SPIDERMAN-BLACKSUIT-HPNR Product Type: TOY_FIGURE Brand (from catalog): Spider-Man Existing Title: Marvel Ultimate Spider-Man Titan Hero Series Armored Spider-Man Figure - 12 Inch Description: Product Description

What’s more powerful than a web-slinging superhero? A web-slinging superhero with the powers of Venom. This awesome Black Suit Spider-Man figure looks like Spider-Man but his specialized suit looks like the black, shape-shifting suit that could make infinite webbing. With his alien web powers, your Black Suit Spider-Man figure will be twice as dangerous to the bad guys - or will he be on their side? It’s all up to you. Marvel products are produced by Hasbro under license from Marvel Characters B.V.

From the Manufacturer

Hasbro is committed to being an ethical and responsible company and is a recognized toy industry leader in the areas of product safety, environmental sustainability, ethical sourcing and philanthropy. Search Terms: marvel avengers spiderman spider man action figure figurine doll boys toys super hero superhero large big 12 inch web slinger gifts presents stocking stuffer holiday gifts under kids children Features: - Black Suit Spider-Man figure stands 12 inches tall - Figure looks like Spider-Man - Special black suit - Ages 4+ - Collect them All === ITEM_NAME (title, <= 75 chars) === Write a concise, keyword-rich, SEO-optimized item_name — a shopper-facing title, not a part number. Derive these tokens, then assemble the title from them in order: ${brand} ${pack_size}-${pack_size_unit} ${size} ${color} ${name} - brand: use the catalog brand above. - pack_size + pack_size_unit: parse from the existing title (e.g. "4-pk", or a dimension like 13" -> pack_size "13", pack_size_unit "in"). Omit if absent. - size, color, name: parse from the existing title (name = what the product IS). Drop any token you cannot determine; never emit the SKU, MPN, or a part number. Lead with the brand; condense to AT MOST 75 characters. Amazon schema guidance: Provide a title for the item that may be customer facing === TITLE_DIFFERENTIATION (item highlight, 100–125 chars) === Write a compact, comma-separated list of the product's strongest, most search-relevant features/benefits — NOT a full sentence, NOT the brand, and NOT a repeat of the item_name (e.g. "Set of 6, Dishwasher Safe, 8oz, BPA-Free, Stackable"). Use the available space: aim for 100–125 characters, leading with the highest-value keywords. Never pad with filler or repeat a point. Capitalize the first letter of every word (e.g. "Natural Wood Grain", but keep acronyms like "US" fully uppercase). Do not use special characters — spell out "&" as "and" and "=" as "is" (e.g. "Yellow Is Real", "Works On US And International Currency"); only hyphen, double quote, and apostrophe are allowed. Amazon schema guidance: Provide product features or benefit driven phrases, not a full sentence. Information will appear only when the item name is under 75 characters. Do not repeat information already in the item name. === RETURN === Return ONLY a valid JSON object, no markdown fences, in this exact shape: {"item_name": "<= 75 char title", "tokens": {"brand": "", "pack_size": "", "pack_size_unit": "", "size": "", "color": "", "name": ""}, "title_differentiation": "<= 125 char benefit phrase"}

anthropic.item_name: Spider-Man Black Suit 12 Inch Titan Hero Figure

anthropic.title_differentiation: Web-Slinging Superhero, Venom Powers, Ages 4 Plus, Collectible Marvel Action Figure

openai.title_differentiation: 12-Inch Tall Black Suit Design, Alien Web Powers, Big Marvel Action Figure, Ages 4, Collect Them All
